div1.entryFree: Unicorn, a fabulous animal with a single horn, of proverbial ferocity: to tame the u. and lion wild, Lucr. 956. I will believe that there are --s, Tp. III, 3, 22. wert thou the u., pride and wrath would confound thee, Tim. IV, 3, 339. --s may be betrayed with trees, Caes. II, 1, 204 (running on them in their blind fury and sticking their horn fast in them).
